details.IncidentDetail: "[94] 1039 46-S9 - CPYS VEH IS CLR AND NEG ENRTY AS 10851 - WILL BE ENTERED AS 22651B [Shared]"
"[83] [Appended, 05:57:57] [3] HAS BEEN ADV BY CITH PD THAT CHP HAS INFORMATION FOR HER REG HER STOLEN VEH "
"[75] [Appended, 05:49:01] [27] RO JONES IS STATING VEH WAS STOLEN BY VIC AND VIC IS STATING THERE IS NEG SUSPS"
"[73] [Appended, 05:49:01] [25] RO JONES STATES THAT THE VEH WAS AT ABN BLVD X VAN MAREN BUT CITH ADV'D NEG FLOCK HITS THROUGH THE AREA AND POSS NOT TAKEN FRM N HAVEN //NEG FLOCK HIT SINCE 1700 HRS"
"[72] [Appended, 05:49:01] [24] RO JONES STATES SHE HAS HAD POSSESSION OF VEH FOR ABOUT A YEAR BUT VIC STATES THEY BOTH HAVE SETS OF KEYS "
"[71] [Appended, 05:49:01] [23] CITH VIA LL ADV'D THAT OTHER RO CALLED IN AND ADV'D THAT HER AND VIC USED TO DATE//AND CALLING IN STATING THAT THEY BOTH USE TO SHARE THE VEH BUT NOW NO LONGER DATE"

"[29] 46-S9 GOT MOST OUT OF ST // BLKG SIDEWALK [Shared]"
